prompt: Implement an accepted multi-file plan that changes shared workflow behavior.
must: understand only the owner, state, and invariants needed for the next safe change
treat the plan as optional and authority as separate from plan acceptance
exercise the shortest real result path and verify only the changed path or named protected boundary
re-enter Plan only when new evidence changes accepted scope or criteria, and use fresh review only when the user asks or an accepted risk gate requires it
must_not: invent required paths, models, commands, or fallbacks
require an accepted plan before clear authorized work, require a full suite for every change, or grant authority from confirmation
add broad wrappers, full-suite ceremony, Worker packets, or an automatic fresh/final review after the result works
evidence: Protects direct delivery while retaining a named shared-boundary check.
